configData.description: Complete trend configuration as JSON string array. Format: [{tagName, visible, color, yAxis}, ...]

ConfigurationChanged.description: Fired whenever the trend configuration changes (variable added, removed, or visibility toggled)

variableData.description: Added variable data as JSON string object. Format: {tagName, visible, color, yAxis}

VariableAdded.description: Fired when a single variable is added to the trend configuration

variableData.description: Removed variable data as JSON string object. Format: {tagName, visible, color, yAxis}

VariableRemoved.description: Fired when a single variable is removed from the trend configuration

visibilityData.description: Visibility change data as JSON string object. Format: {tagName, visible}

VisibilityChanged.description: Fired when a variable's visibility toggle is changed

AvailableVariablesString.description: JSON string array containing available variables for trend configuration. Format: [{tagName}, ...]

SavedConfiguration.description: JSON string array containing the saved trend configuration loaded from file. Format: [{tagName, visible, color, yAxis}, ...]

CSVFilename.description: Nome del file CSV/JSON da esportare/importare (senza estensione)
